data.title: Majestic Gold Corp. Reports Strong 2024 Financial Results and Strategic Expansion
data.description:
Majestic Gold ( (TSE:MJS) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Majestic Gold Corp. reported a significant financial performance for the year ending December 31, 2024, with a net income of $20.5 million, marking a 68% increase from the previous year. The company’s revenue rose to $71 million, driven by a 23.3% increase in the average realized gold sales price. Despite challenges from ongoing expansion work at the SJG open pit, gold production increased by 3.6% to 31,949 ounces. The company maintained a strong financial position with cash reserves of $100.7 million and working capital of $86.3 million. Majestic also expanded its operations by acquiring a 52% equity stake in Yantai City Mujin Mining Company Limited and the Muping Gold Project, indicating strategic growth and investment in new projects.

More about Majestic Gold

Majestic Gold Corp. operates in the mining industry, focusing primarily on gold production. The company is involved in the extraction and sale of gold, with a market focus on increasing production efficiency and expanding its mining operations.

YTD Price Performance: 31.25%

Average Trading Volume: 142,737

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$109.5M

data.title: Otovo ASA Completes Transformative Asset Sale to Swiss Life
data.description:
Otovo AS Class A ( (DE:89K) ) has provided an announcement.

Otovo ASA has completed the sale of its continental subscription assets to FORTE PV S.à r.l., managed by Swiss Life Asset Managers, for EUR 108 million. This transaction marks a significant milestone for Otovo, shifting its focus from investment to profitability by leveraging its unique infrastructure and scaling its continental subscription offering in partnership with SLAM. The deal is part of a broader company reset, which includes cost reductions and a new sales approach, positioning Otovo to capitalize on megatrends in the European home energy market.

More about Otovo AS Class A

Otovo is a marketplace focused on providing homeowners with easy access to solar panels and home batteries. The company leverages proprietary technology to analyze home potential and facilitate an automatic bidding process among local, high-quality energy installers to find the best price and installer for customers.

YTD Price Performance: 81.67%

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: €35.77M

data.title: BBGI Global Infrastructure Releases SFDR Periodic Disclosure for 2024
data.description:
An update from BBGI Shs Ordinary ( (GB:BBGI) ) is now available.

BBGI Global Infrastructure S.A. has released its periodic disclosure in compliance with the Sustainable Finance Disclosure Regulation (SFDR) for the period from January 1, 2024, to December 31, 2024. This disclosure replaces the previous one dated December 31, 2023, and reflects the company’s commitment to transparency in its investment practices. The announcement underscores BBGI’s proactive approach to managing its investments and its focus on maintaining high-quality social infrastructure, which is crucial for its stakeholders and aligns with its long-term strategic goals.

More about BBGI Shs Ordinary

BBGI Global Infrastructure S.A. is a responsible infrastructure investment company and a constituent of the FTSE 250, focusing on a globally diversified, low-risk portfolio of essential social infrastructure investments. The company is committed to delivering stable cash flows, long-term dividend growth, and sustainable returns for shareholders, with investments supported by secure public sector-backed revenues in highly rated investment grade countries.

data.title: Pak Tak International Reports Increased Revenue but Sustained Losses in 2024
data.description:
Pak Tak International Limited ( (HK:2668) ) has shared an announcement.

Pak Tak International Limited announced its audited consolidated results for the year ending December 31, 2024, revealing a significant increase in revenue to HKD 674,764,000 from HKD 422,492,000 in 2023. Despite the revenue growth, the company reported a loss of HKD 229,199,000, attributed to factors such as a fair value loss on investment properties and impairment losses on goodwill, impacting its financial performance and stakeholder interests.

More about Pak Tak International Limited

Pak Tak International Limited is a company incorporated in Bermuda with limited liability, listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. The company operates in various sectors, focusing on investment properties and related financial activities.

data.title: Shanghai Gench Education Group Reports 2024 Annual Results with Revenue Growth but Profit Decline
data.description:
An update from Shanghai Gench Education Group Limited ( (HK:1525) ) is now available.

Shanghai Gench Education Group Limited announced its annual financial results for the year ended December 31, 2024. The company reported a 4.3% increase in revenue to RMB 969,854,000 compared to the previous year. However, there was a decline in gross profit by 6.0% and a significant drop in profit before tax by 21.4%, resulting in a profit for the year of RMB 223,618,000, down 21.1% from 2023. These results indicate a challenging financial year for the company, impacting its profitability despite increased revenue.

More about Shanghai Gench Education Group Limited

Shanghai Gench Education Group Limited operates in the education industry, focusing on providing educational services. The company is incorporated in the Cayman Islands and is listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange.

data.title: HealthyWay Inc. Announces Executive Leadership Changes
data.description:
HealthyWay Inc. ( (HK:2587) ) has shared an update.

HealthyWay Inc., a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, has announced significant changes in its executive team, effective March 28, 2025. The changes include the resignation of Mr. Li Guomin as Chief Financial Officer and Joint Company Secretary, with Mr. Chen Zhoufeng, previously a Vice President, stepping into these roles. Additionally, Mr. Chen Chengchun has been appointed as Vice President, and Mr. Zhuang Haifeng as Chief Efficiency Officer. These appointments are expected to impact the company’s financial operations and efficiency, potentially affecting its market positioning.

More about HealthyWay Inc.

data.description:
Pearson ( (GB:PSON) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Pearson PLC has announced a change in its voting rights, with Ameriprise Financial, Inc. increasing its stake to 5.114% from a previous 4.93%. This acquisition of voting rights by a major financial entity like Ameriprise could potentially impact Pearson’s strategic decisions and influence its market positioning, reflecting a significant interest from investors in the company’s future direction.

Pearson PLC is a UK-based company primarily operating in the education sector. It offers a wide range of educational products and services, including textbooks, digital learning tools, and assessment services, focusing on both the UK and international markets.

data.title: Argo Living Soils Corp. Partners with NOWM for Strategic Growth
data.description:
An update from Argo Living Soils Corp. ( (TSE:ARGO) ) is now available.

Argo Living Soils Corp. has entered into a consulting agreement with New Orleans Private Wealth Management (NOWM) to provide strategic advisory services for business development, product planning, and market expansion. This agreement, which includes compensation options for NOWM, is expected to enhance Argo’s market positioning by facilitating introductions to strategic partners and potential customers, potentially impacting its operations positively.

More about Argo Living Soils Corp.

Argo Living Soils Corp. is dedicated to pioneering sustainable solutions in agriculture and construction. Established in 2018, the company focuses on biochar, graphene, soil amendments, living soils, biofertilizers, vermicompost, and compound extracts for high-value crops. Argo is expanding its focus to include green concrete and graphene technologies.

data.title: CI&T Files 2024 Annual Report, Reinforcing Industry Position
data.description:
An announcement from CI&T ( (CINT) ) is now available.

On March 28, 2025, CI&T announced the filing of its 2024 annual report on Form 20-F with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. This filing underscores CI&T’s commitment to transparency and regulatory compliance, potentially strengthening its position in the global technology transformation industry. Shareholders can access the report online or request a hard copy, reflecting the company’s dedication to stakeholder engagement.

More about CI&T

CI&T (NYSE: CINT) is a global technology transformation specialist serving over 100 large enterprises and fast-growing clients. With a 30-year history, the company excels in AI, strategy, customer experience, software development, cloud services, and data. CI&T’s proprietary AI platform, CI&T FLOW, enhances team productivity and ensures efficient delivery of solutions. The company operates globally with over 6,900 professionals across nine countries.

data.title: Sichuan Baicha Baidao Reports Revenue Decline Amid Market Challenges
data.description:
An announcement from Sichuan Baicha Baidao Industrial Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:2555) ) is now available.

Sichuan Baicha Baidao Industrial Co., Ltd. reported a decrease in revenue for the year ended December 31, 2024, with a 13.8% decline compared to the previous year. The company attributed this decline to shifts in consumer behavior and increased market competition, prompting it to implement supportive policies and favorable pricing for franchisees, as well as increased marketing efforts. Despite the revenue drop, the company continues to expand its ChaPanda store network into lower-tier cities, aiming to capture growth potential and enhance brand visibility.

More about Sichuan Baicha Baidao Industrial Co., Ltd. Class H

Sichuan Baicha Baidao Industrial Co., Ltd. is a joint stock company incorporated in China, primarily engaged in the sale of goods and equipment for tea drink production, including dairy products, tea leaves, fruits, packaging materials, and store equipment. The company also generates revenue through royalty and franchising fees, and operates a network of ChaPanda stores across various city tiers in China.

Average Trading Volume: 2,833,942

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy
